signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Kickers with this ability experience a slower kicking meter for better power and accuracy on kicks up to 45 yards.
Kickers with this ability can see the entirety of the kicking arc
Zone Hawk defenders lock down a part of the field. When they enter the zone, this ability increases the rate of interceptions while in zone coverage.
Defenders with this ability have a greater chance of forcing fumbles when landing Perfect Hit Sticks
Defenders with this ability can reach out of engaged blocks to tackle or sack nearby ballcarriers.
Defenders with this ability use faster run shed moves for a better chance at shedding blocks against outside zone plays.
Players with this ability will recover from the effects of Wear and Tear and fatigue at an increased rate between plays.
Defenders with this ability have a larger timing window for landing Perfect Hit Sticks
Players with this ability will recover from the effects of Wear and Tear and fatigue at an increased rate between plays.
Blockers with this ability start every new blocking encounter with built-in resistance
During preplay, players with this ability will highlight any oncoming blitzers on 3rd and 4th downs. Can be bluffed.
Players with this ability grant improved blocking to the entire offensive line.
Defenders with this ability have a chance to receive dominant bull rush wins when their stamina is full. This consumes additional stamina.
Defenders with this ability can apply pressure to the quarterback from a greater distance.
Defenders with this ability use faster run shed moves for a better chance at shedding blocks within 5 yards of the goal line.

signatureAbility.signatureActivationDescription: Make consecutive passes for 5+ yards in air
signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Accurate passers know that ball placement is the difference between a touchdown and a turnover. When they enter the zone, all passes are thrown with perfect accuracy.
Passers with this ability have perfect accuracy on all throws under 40 yards while running outside the pocket (except on high/low throws).
Passers with this ability have perfect accuracy on all unpressured throws inside the red zone (except on high/low throws).
Passers with this ability have increased throw power on bullet precision passes (except on high/low throws).
Passers with this ability have perfect accuracy on all cross-body throws up to 20 yards (except on high/low throws).
Passers with this ability have a reduced chance to be impacted by throw penalties caused by defensive pressure while their feet are set in the pocket
Defenders with this ability apply bonus fatigue to their man coverage target after a successful press win
Defenders with this ability generally react much faster to receiver cut moves when in man coverage and inside the numbers
Defenders with this ability force more catch tackle knockouts in man-to-man versus deep routes 20+ yards from the LoS.
Blockers with this ability are almost guaranteed to win any double team block they are engaged in
Blockers with this ability will dominantly win impact blocks on screen plays
Blockers with this ability have stronger protection against dominant bull rush moves attempted by defenders
Defenders with this ability use faster run shed moves for a better chance at shedding blocks against inside run plays.
Defenders with this ability have higher chance to catch uncontested interceptions, and they have unlimited stamina on the return (until using a special move or breaking a tackle).
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes 20+ yards from the LoS, inside the numbers
Players with this ability will distract defenders for longer with their runoffs
Ballcarriers with this ability have steerable spin animations.
Players with this ability have a chance to replenish their stamina, once per play, when it is half depleted
The most effective ball carriers prioritize maintaining possession over all else. When they enter the zone, no tackles made against them will result in a fumble.
